name: Yang Jian

skills.name: Mind Games
skills.description: Yang Jian's Resistance increases for each nearby enemy hero.

skills.name: Unleash the Hound
skills.description: Yang Jian commands a Heaven Hound to dash in the target direction, marking and dealing damage to the first enemy hit. Upon using again, Yang Jian dashes to the marked enemy and deals damage to them.

skills.name: Vain Disillusionment
skills.description: Yang Jian deals damage to enemies in front of him and stuns them while reducing their Movement Speed. if an enemy is hit, his Basic Attack is enhanced to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Sight of Origin
skills.description: Yang Jian unleashes a beam of light in the target direction, dealing damage and recovering Health.

tips: Yang Jian is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Eye of the Phoenix → Immovable - Sky Dome → Cuirass of Savagery.
Run Mutation for stats that match Yang Jian's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Unleash the Hound → Vain Disillusionment → Sight of Origin → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
Yang Jian excels into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.
Yang Jian sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Yang Jian good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is Tier B Warrior with 50.6% win rate, 0.4% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Yang Jian build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Eye of the Phoenix, Immovable - Sky Dome, Cuirass of Savagery. Run Mutation arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Yang Jian?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun into Yang Jian. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Yang Jian completes core items. Yang Jian struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Yang Jian counter?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is strong into Diaochan, Luna, Dr Bian according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Yang Jian when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Yang Jian good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Yang Jian play?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Yang Jian?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Yang Jian or Li Xin — which is better?
faqs.answer: Yang Jian vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Yang Jian when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Yang Jian?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Warrior picks unless targeting a one-trick.
